My 1st Book of Military Superheroes

Meet Sara Kale

Sara spent years as an engineer, learning to take complicated systems and make them clear. When she had kids of her own, she realized that same skill was exactly what great children's books need.

That's how Rainbow Arts Studio was born. Every book is written like a warm conversation, covering everything from the human body to the seven continents, from money basics to the magic of kindness. The goal is simple: make children feel curious, confident, and loved.

Master's in Engineering Published Author Available on Amazon
